CREATE TABLE webdav_log (id INT PRIMARY KEY, client_ip VARCHAR(15), request_timestamp TIMESTAMP, response_timestamp TIMESTAMP, request_line TEXT, response_line TEXT);

INSERT INTO webdav_log (id, client_ip, request_timestamp, response_timestamp, request_line, response_line) VALUES (1, '127.0.0.1', TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 13:49:37', TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 13:49:37', 'PROPFIND /DAV/css/one.css HTTP/1.1', 'HTTP/1.1 207 Multi-Status');

INSERT INTO webdav_log (id, client_ip, request_timestamp, response_timestamp, request_line, response_line) VALUES (2, '192.168.1.1', TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 14:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 14:00:00', 'GET /DAV/index.html HTTP/1.1', 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK');
SELECT * FROM webdav_log WHERE client_ip = '127.0.0.1' AND response_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 00:00:00' AND response_timestamp <= TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 23:59:59';

INSERT INTO webdav_log (id, client_ip, request_timestamp, response_timestamp, request_line, response_line) SELECT seq, '10.0.0.1', NOW(), NOW(), request, response FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS seq, 'PUT /DAV/file.txt HTTP/1.1' AS request, 'HTTP/1.1 201 Created' AS response FROM generate_series(1, 100) ) AS subquery WHERE seq < 50;

INSERT INTO webdav_log (id, client_ip, request_timestamp, response_timestamp, request_line, response_line) VALUES (3, NULL, TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 14:30:00', TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 14:30:00', 'DELETE /DAV/file.txt HTTP/1.1', 'HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found');
SELECT COUNT(*), client_ip FROM webdav_log GROUP BY client_ip HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
DELETE FROM webdav_log WHERE request_timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2001-10-02 13:00:00';
UPDATE webdav_log SET response_line = 'HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error' WHERE request_line LIKE 'GET%';
